candidates.row_label: Depreciation of fixed assets and amortisation of intangible assets in COR/COGS
candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears as a component beneath the already selected parent row 'Costs of sales'. The amounts reconcile into the selected COGS total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of fixed assets and amortisation of intangible assets
candidates.why: The generic D&A rows in the SG&A area do not belong to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS row is 'Costs of sales'. The explicit COR/COGS D&A line is embedded within that parent total, so no separate COGS_DA row should be added.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of fixed assets and amortisation of intangible assets
candidates.why: There are two rows with this exact label. The first sits under 'Selling and distribution costs' and reconciles into that selected parent, so it should not be added separately. The second sits immediately below 'General Administrative Costs' and appears excluded from the selected row, since 'Administrative expenses' equals 'General Administrative Costs' plus this D&A line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of fixed assets and amortisation of intangible assets in COR/COGS
candidates.why: This belongs to COGS, not SG&A.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of fixed assets and amortisation of intangible assets

variables.notes: Add only the SG&A/admin occurrence of 'Depreciation of fixed assets and amortisation of intangible assets' (the one immediately below 'General Administrative Costs', not the earlier selling-and-distribution occurrence). Manual review is needed because the sheet contains two identical row labels and the schema cannot disambiguate by position.
